home.heroSub: Khlicka xisweletswa • Rhumeriwa PEP ya kusuhi
home.curatedDesc: Mafeshoni, elektroniki, swilo swa kaya - kuma swisweletswa leswi ku fanelaka.
home.promiseDesc: A hi xavi ntsena - hi nyika maitemogelo lawa u nga ma tshembaka.
home.readyTitle: Ku Xava Ka Wena Loku Landzelaka
home.readyDesc: Hlangana na vaxavi lava tshembaka Fastlane siku na siku.
home.trustAuthenticDesc: Swisweletswa swa ntiyiso, vukheta byo tiyisiseriwa
home.trustSupportDesc: Mpfuneto wa WhatsApp nkarhi wun'wana na wun'wana
home.prideBadge: Hi Titlhariha hi ra Laha Kaya • Afrika Dzonga
home.brandText1: Fastlane yi tswariwe hi mbono wa ku tumbuluxa maitemogelo ya ku xava lama xaxamaka vuhle bya laha kaya loko yi nyika vukheta na vukorhokeri lebyi nga faniki. Hi tshemba ku nyika vanhu va laha kaya matimba hi ku teka xiyimo ikonomini na maitemogelo ya ku xava lama xaxamekaka.
home.brandText2: Ku xava kun'wana na kun'wana loku u ku endlaka ku pfuna mabindzu ya laha kaya, ku tumbuluxa mintirho, na ku engetela eka ku kula ka mabindzu ya Afrika Dzonga. Loko u xava na hina, a wu xavi switsweletswa ntsena - u veka eka siku rinene.
home.subtitle: Fastlane yi tlula switolo - yi ri ntshukumo. Kuma switsweletswa swo saseka, PAXI yi rhumela hi ku hatlisa eka PEP ya kusuhi, na ku tidlaya hi ku pfuna bindzu leri tidlayaka ra Afrika Dzonga.

product.paxiText: PEP ya kusuhi. R100. Tisa ID na nomboro.

checkout.cancelText: U na swilo eka kolari. U endla yini?
checkout.paxiText: Phakheji ya wena yi ta rhumeriwa eka xitolo xa PEP lexi nga kusuhi na wena. Ntsengo: R100.
checkout.name: Vito
checkout.cartSaved: Ku haka ku khanseliwile. Kolari ya wena yi hlayisiwile.
checkout.cartCleared: Ku haka ku khanseliwile. Kolari yi susiwe.
checkout.invalidPostal: Hi kombela u nghenisa khodi ya poso ya tinomboro ta 4 leti lulameke
checkout.orderSuccess: Odara yi vekiwe hi ku humelela!
